summary: The four novel commands (discover, movers, designers deltas, tags) plus token-gated download and favorites are hand-implemented; the generator only scaffolds stubs.
reason: movers/designers-deltas compute cross-sync deltas via a hand-authored design_snapshots table keyed by sync timestamp; discover ranks the mirror by designScore with optional live AMS/weight enrichment; tags does multi-tag intersection over the local mirror. A regen re-emits these as TODO stubs, so the bodies and the snapshot migration must be re-implemented, not just scaffolded.
